entries.description: Registered session 1 via start_session (claude/anthropic/claude-fable-5); read the preload, spec.md, and prior-set conventions; confirmed no other set in flight, provider keys present, decision-review queue empty; authored the ai-assignment.md Session 1 block (no routed orchestrator recommendation existed - operator invocation recorded per the 094-097 precedent).

Spec step 3 record-and-skip: audited every ai_router config-block reader (spec_config.py tier/requiresUAT/requiresE2E/uatScope; start_session verificationMode/pathAwareCritique/contractGate seeds; session_state.py totalSessions). All key-pluck specific fields, so an added kind: line is inert; no schema_validator.py / field allowlist exists (the spec_config.py docstring reference is aspirational). No Python consumer of kind exists today (verdict: consumers are Set 099 delete rule + human legibility) - Python mirror skipped per spec (no speculative parsing).

Spec step 2: SessionSetKind type + optional SessionSetConfig.kind (raw) / SessionSet.kind (validated) in src/types.ts; raw capture in parseSessionSetConfig + warn-and-degrade validation in readSessionSets (fileSystem.ts), module-posture split so rewrite-path parser callers never re-warn. Unknown value warns, never refuses; absent stays undefined (every pre-098 spec valid unchanged). tsc --noEmit clean.

Spec step 4: kind documented in docs/spec-md-schema.md (field reference line + semantics paragraph) and docs/planning/session-set-authoring-guide.md (config-block snippet line, Field semantics entry with the scaffolder-output-only when-to-use rule + verdict decisions 5-6, Defaults note). Spec template snippet deliberately untouched: hand-authored sets omit kind.

Spec steps 5-6: 11 new Layer 2 tests in sessionSetKind.test.ts (parse matrix absent/plan/decomposition/unknown/malformed at parser layer; round-trip + warn assertions at readSessionSets layer, incl. case-tolerance and no-warn-on-malformed). Layer 2: 1522/1522. Layer 1 pytest: 3030 passed / 6 skipped. Layer 3 Playwright run locally per L-064-12 (readSessionSets feeds the Explorer): 25/26 + 1 electron palette-timing flake in blocked-by-prereqs (pre-existing surface, untouched by this set) that passed 4/4 on isolated re-run. esbuild compile clean.

Phased discovery round 1 (fan-out K=2, both gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded, s1-conventions.md up-front block): VERIFIED, zero findings on both calls - non-blocking, no supplementary/remediation phases opened. Cost $0.157.

Routed analysis (gemini-pro, $0.002, saved raw at s1-next-set-analysis.json): Session 2 orchestrator claude/anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5/medium (settled design, deterministic implementation; keeps openai/google verification pool free); runner-up claude-sonnet-5. Recorded in ai-assignment.md + disposition.next_orchestrator (switch-due-to-cost).

Registered session 2 via start_session (claude/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5, operator-invoked via /model sonnet, overriding the routed haiku-4-5 recommendation); read the spec, Session 1's outcome, the authoring guide, the existing docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/ bundle, and moduleAuthoring.ts's existing scaffold-writer patterns.

Spec step 2 (plan half): docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/module-plan-set.spec.md.template authored - kind: plan, single session, create-or-import the module's project-plan.md, placeholder-parameterized (MODULE_SLUG/MODULE_TITLE/SLUG/CREATED/PLAN_REL_PATH).

Spec step 2 (decomposition half): docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/module-decomposition-set.spec.md.template authored - kind: decomposition, single session, read the plan + existing module sets, author the next batch, prerequisites: pre-linked to the sibling plan set (condition: complete).

Spec step 3: scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets(root, module) in moduleAuthoring.ts - next-free-number resolution (new nextSessionSetNumberFrom in resolveSetNumber.ts mirroring ai_router.resolve_set.next_session_set_number; new listSessionSetDirNames in fileSystem.ts), renders both templates (spec.md only), identity-based skip-existing, fail-loud invalid-slug refusal before any write, parse-after-write guard via the real parsers.

Decomposition set's prerequisites: entry cross-links to its sibling plan set's slug (condition: complete), verified via parsePrerequisites round-trip in the test suite - reuses the existing gating machinery per verdict decision 6, no new mechanism.

Spec steps 4-5: 12 new Layer 2 tests (moduleAuthoring.test.ts: template/render parity against the checked-in files, kind + prerequisites parse-back, fresh-module numbering, numbers-advance, two skip-existing variants, refusal-leaves-tree-untouched, declared-planPath propagation; resolveSetNumber.test.ts: 3 new nextSessionSetNumberFrom cases). Extension unit 1522 -> 1534. Layer 1 pytest: 3030 passed / 6 skipped (unchanged - no ai_router files touched). tsc --noEmit, eslint, esbuild all clean. No Layer 3 run: no readSessionSets/rendering-surface file touched (writer not yet UI-wired), so the L-064-12 trigger does not apply.

Phased loop: discovery round 1 (fan-out K=2, both gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded) ISSUES_FOUND, 2 Major (both independently found by both calls) - decomposition template wrongly told the AI to hand-author session-state.json for child sets (contradicts the blessed-writer state-file contract); the two render functions embedded template text as hand-synced TS literals with no parity test against the checked-in .template files. Both fixed (s2-remediation-round-1.md); remediation-review round 2: VERIFIED, 0 blocking, both fix verdicts accepted. Routed cost $0.40.

disposition.json authored (status completed, verification_verdict VERIFIED, next_orchestrator null - set-terminal session); change-log.md authored; ai-assignment.md Session 2 actuals recorded (model deviation: operator-invoked sonnet-5 over the routed haiku-4-5 recommendation, no approach deviation). Committed + pushed (bd4e69c). pathAwareCritique: advisory - the manual multi-provider GitHub-Copilot critique stage was not run this close (requires operator-side manual action across GPT-5.4/Gemini-Pro editors); advisory only warns, never blocks, and is offered to the operator as optional out-of-band follow-up rather than fabricated. No version bump / no publish out of this set - single release boundary after Set 101.
